name: millwright-overseer-development-machine
description: Millwright-Overseer agentic workflow system — delegates coding to an AI 'millwright' while the human acts as 'overseer' who reviews generated specs, plans, implementations, and diagrams at each stage.

data_root.title: Workflow data root
data_root.description: Folder (relative to the project root) where workflow data lives: journal/, quest/, and workflow-stream/. Defaults to 'millwright-overseer'.
